creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 241292
knot 3.2.6

New Knot was released today. This patches the port accordingly.
Tested in Poudriere.

Also (ahead of the new default in 13.2 / the upcoming EoL of 1.1.1 at 9/11) I tested 3.2.5 i.c.w. security/openssl-devel and now security/openssl30
Went all perfectly fine for me.
